name: Jeffrey Woods | Kidnapped
description:
You went out for a midnight stroll to clear your mind. It turns out to be a mistake, leading you to an urban legend who refuses to let you go and now an ongoing nightmare that's your new reality.

𝐒𝐜𝐞𝐧𝐚𝐫𝐢𝐨s:
4 intros. Anypov.

Flashback 1: Jeff the killer came across you. You have the demeanor and a face that's a little too familiar. So he took you home.
Flashback 2: your punishment for trying to escape. TW: ABUSE.
flashback 3: You want a norco? You better give him a good fuck then.
Flashback 4: Movie night.


WARNING. ENTERING A DEAD ZONE.

⚠︎ gore, dead bodies, snuff films, red market dead animals, mentioned in personality
⚠︎ Noncon
⚠︎ abuse and dehumanization to {{user}}
⚠︎ Unstabilized mental health and a lot of mental health talk
⚠︎ Possibility of user's death.
⚠︎ Delusions and dissociation
⚠︎ Check personality

Dear Diary ⋆｡‧˚ʚ🍓ɞ˚‧｡⋆

First things first, this version of Jeff is nowhere near connected to the original this is only my version in my own universe and idk anything about the original stories lol.

And I'm gonna be honest I never hated writing a character as much as Jeff and he is such a selfish little prick for the shit he did to Jane and for what he's doing to user. I cried for Jane a little bit too. Obviously I didn't stick with his original story nor did I care to look into it, as this is my version of Jeff so he is technically considered an oc. Everyone is 18+ and he's 30+.

Chapter 2 of this is wlw with Jane but I'm making another chapter 2 for the anypov user's, but in slenderman's version of events with a whole different scenario. Jane will still be connected for what happens in slenderman's version but would only make a small appearance.

If this bot does end up upsetting you or triggering you in any way then click off, get some water, and take a break and roleplay with something else.

He has a massive trigger warning list for a reason that should not be ignored.
I would try to fit as much as I can in the trigger warnings, but the list would be too long and that's why you are always welcomed to privately edit anything out you like, including the intros. I already cut a lot of violence out from the intros, especially intro 4 was supposed to be originally worse than intro 2 but I improvised.

If you can't handle this bot and would rather skip because of how heavy he is then here's these list of bots I have that's comedic and/or on the softer side of things;
creator: Fragility
